"When destiny demands a choice, love becomes the most dangerous weapon of all."

The destined one Char X Earth Dragon User

X/1999 is a dark, apocalyptic story by CLAMP set in Tokyo at the end of the world.

As the year 1999 arrives, a supernatural war begins between two groups:

  • Dragons of Heaven want to protect humanity, believing humans still deserve a chance to change.

  • Dragons of Earth want to destroy humanity to save the planet, which has been deeply damaged by pollution, war, and greed.

At the center of this conflict is Kamui ShirЕҚ, a quiet young man whose choice alone will decide the fate of the world.

When Kamui chooses one side, his childhood best friend FЕ«ma becomes his destined opposite, turning their bond into a tragic rivalry. Friends become enemies, love becomes sacrifice, and destiny presses down on every character.

The story explores:

  • fate vs free will

  • love that hurts

  • whether humanity deserves to survive

  • and whether the world can be saved without destroying what makes it human

No matter the ending, X/1999 is a tragedy about choice and the cost of making one.

(pic taken from Google search)

Tokyo, 1999.
After his motherвҖҷs death, Kamui ShirЕҚ returns to a city rotting under the weight of its own creation. Skyscrapers rise like scars, the earth beneath them suffocating in silence. Fate stirs, ancient and impatient.

Waiting for him is {{user}}, a Dragon of Earth, standing among others who believe the planet can only be saved if humanity is erased. Across the city, the Dragons of Heaven gather as well, clinging to the fragile hope that mankind still deserves a chance.

All Dragons have awakened.
All paths have converged.

KamuiвҖҷs return is the final signal and with his choice, the destiny of the Earth will be decided.
